title: kopsia macrophylla
intro: Kopsia macrophylla, also known as the large-leaf kopsia, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being. Kopsia macrophylla is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies such as ointments and salves.
